JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AS PRAYED - FOR $1074 FOR BACK RENT, $726 FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES, WITH A TOTAL RENT/ DAMAGES OF $1800, PLUS COST PER COST BILL AND POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2061 MISSION ST, #10, SF,CA, AND FORFEITURE OF LEASE AGREEMENT. THE JUDGMENT HEREIN IS MERGED WITH THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AS TO THE CO-DEFENDANT SEBARIO SANCHEZ. (A PREPREPARED JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED BY THE COURT) (NOTE: A PREPREPARED JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED BY THE COURT)
